creator: tomtinn@gmail.com
text:
Hello

Im experiencing the exact same issue on my Freebsd-8-p2 box

FreeBSD knut 8.0-RELEASE-p2 FreeBSD 8.0-RELEASE-p2 #0: Tue Apr 27
04:36:16 UTC 2010     gunnar@knut:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

Apr 27 16:19:09 knut kernel: pid 7944 (try), uid 0: exited on signal
10 (core dumped)

Some notes about my system.
Im using zfs as my root filesystem so no UFS.
Computer reboots when I try to copy a file from an ntfs filesystem.
The ntfs filesystem has been successfully used by windows and ntfs-3g
on a linux box.

Afraid I don't have more info than this at the moment.

With Regards

Gunnar
